case_title: HOVEY, FREDERICK C. VS CHIN, SING CHANG et al

docket_entries.description: TRIAL RESET TO MAR-13-1996 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT C TRIAL OF FEB-13-1996 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
CERTIFIED MAIL TO FREDERICK C HOVEY RETURNED SIGNED.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HOVEY, FREDERICK C. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CHIN, SING CHANG CHIN, BEE CHOO $200.00 PRINCIPAL, $50.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $250.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT CHIN, BEE CHOO
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,000.00 FILED BY HOVEY, FREDERICK C. AS TO DEFENDANT CHIN, SING CHANG CHIN, BEE CHOO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-13-1996 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT C
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT CHIN, SING CHANG
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT CHIN, SING CHANG
CLAIM OF DEFENDANT FOR $1,075.00 FILED BY CHIN, SING CHANG CHIN, BEE CHOO AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT HOVEY, FREDERICK C. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-13-1996 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT C
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT CHIN, SING CHANG CHIN, BEE CHOO IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY CROSS DEFENDANT HOVEY, FREDERICK C. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT CHIN, BEE CHOO
